title: NullReferenceException in UserProfile 1
body: Getting exception when viewing a user without an avatar.
code_snippet:
1. def get_avatar(user):
2.     if user:
3.         return user.avatar.url
4.     return 'default.png'

title: Model inference takes too long 1
body: The new transformer model is timing out the API response.
code_snippet:
1. def predict(text):
2.     model = load_model()
3.     inputs = tokenize(text)
4.     return model(inputs)
